documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the IPA dumper (decrypted App Store apps) category. Fits when the engagement needs: frida-ios-dump Pull a decrypted IPA from a jailbroken device.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: frida-ios-dump Pull a decrypted IPA from a jailbroken device.
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `./dump.py Aftenposten`. Further invocations from upstream: `Dumping Aftenposten to /var/folders/wn/9v1hs8ds6nv_xj7g95zxyl140000gn/T`; `start dump /var/containers/Bundle/Application/66423A80-0AFE-471C-BC9B-B571107D3C27/AftenpostenApp.app/AftenpostenApp`. frida-ios-dump Pull a decrypted IPA from a jailbroken device.
